name: Persimmon Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups persimmon pulp (I purchase pulp from Dillman Farms)
2 cups milk (original called for 1 cup half and half and 1 cup milk - I used a 12 ounce can of evaporated skimmed milk and 1/2 cup of non-fat rice milk)
1/8 teaspoon cloves (original called for 1 teaspoon - optional)
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees. Mix sugar, persimmon pulp, egg whites, vanilla, and milk in a bowl. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and cloves with baking soda. Blend the two mixtures together. Pour into a greased 9x13 inch pan. Bake for 60 minutes or until set and a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Let cool completely. Traditionally served with Cool Whip (I used Cool Whip Light).
